chunks.text: Technical Reports - Kurt Keutzer. Efficient and Scalable Large Multimodal Models (EECS-2024-186) by Sheng Shen. Treating Models Better for Language-agnostic Understanding (EECS-2023-148) by Brian Yu. Large-Batch Training for LSTM and Beyond (EECS-2018-138) by Yang You, James Demmel, Kurt Keutzer, Cho-Jui Hsieh, Chris Ying and Jonathan Hseu. Parallelism, Patterns, and Performance in Iterative MRI Reconstruction (EECS-2011-134) by Mark Murphy.
